raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Chiquita Canyon Landfill fire has tripled in size, now spanning nearly 100 acres.",
    "The landfill fire continues to release toxic and cancer-causing chemicals into nearby communities.",
    "Residents near the landfill have reported concerning health symptoms linked to the landfill's toxins.",
    "The Landfill Safety Act aims to strengthen oversight of landfill operators to prevent health crises.",
    "The Landfill Safety Act requires landfill operators to alert nearby residents when subsurface temperatures exceed 146°F for over 60 consecutive days.",
    "The Landfill Safety Act mandates submission of a corrective action plan within 14 days of high temperatures at landfills.",
    "The Landfill Safety Act triggers a multi-agency response team if temperatures at landfills continue rising.",
    "Current monitoring procedures failed to prevent the Chiquita Canyon Landfill disaster.",
    "The Chiquita Canyon Landfill is claimed to be one of the most dangerous long-term public health threats in California.",
    "Jane Williams stated that Chiquita Canyon is the longest continually operating chemical disaster in the country's history."
  ]
}
```
